auth.label: API Token
auth.description: SupportBee API token sent as an Authorization Bearer token. Find it from your SupportBee desk by clicking your profile picture and then API Token: https://supportbee.com/docs/api/api

extraFields.label: Company Subdomain
extraFields.description: The SupportBee desk subdomain used to build https://<company>.supportbee.com API requests.

actions.name: add_label_to_ticket
actions.description: Add an existing SupportBee label to a ticket.

label_name.description: The existing SupportBee label name to add.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a SupportBee label to a ticket.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee label ID.
The SupportBee label name.
The SupportBee ticket ID associated with the label.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when adding a SupportBee label.

actions.name: create_ticket
actions.description: Create a SupportBee ticket with JSON body content and optional email recipients.

requester_name.description: The name of the ticket requester.

requester_email.description: The email address of the ticket requester.

notify_requester.description: Whether SupportBee should email a copy of the ticket to the requester, CC, and BCC recipients.

text.description: The plain-text ticket body. Either text or html must be provided.

html.description: The HTML ticket body. Either text or html must be provided.

attachment_ids.description: SupportBee attachment IDs that were already uploaded through the SupportBee attachment API.

forwarding_address_id.description: The SupportBee forwarding address ID used as the sender for ticket copies or auto-responses.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a SupportBee ticket.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee ticket ID.
The ticket subject.
The number of replies on the ticket.
The number of comments on the ticket.
The ticket creation time returned by SupportBee.
The ticket last-activity time returned by SupportBee.
Whether the ticket is currently unanswered.
Whether the ticket is archived.
Whether the ticket is marked as spam.

labels.description: The label names returned with the ticket.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a SupportBee ticket.

actions.name: create_ticket_comment
actions.description: Create a SupportBee ticket comment with JSON body content.

text.description: The plain-text comment body. Either text or html must be provided.

html.description: The HTML comment body. Either text or html must be provided.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for creating a SupportBee ticket comment.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee comment ID.
The comment creation time returned by SupportBee.
The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a SupportBee ticket comment.

actions.name: create_ticket_reply
actions.description: Create a SupportBee ticket reply with JSON body content.

text.description: The plain-text reply body. Either text or html must be provided.

html.description: The HTML reply body. Either text or html must be provided.

attachment_ids.description: SupportBee attachment IDs that were already uploaded through the SupportBee attachment API.

email.description: The email address of the agent to reply on behalf of.

on_behalf_of.description: The SupportBee agent to reply on behalf of. Admin rights are required upstream.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for creating a SupportBee ticket reply.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee reply ID.
The reply creation time returned by SupportBee.
The reply summary returned by SupportBee.

cc.description: The CC email addresses returned with the reply.

bcc.description: The BCC email addresses returned with the reply.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a SupportBee ticket reply.

actions.name: create_user
actions.description: Create a SupportBee user or customer group.

email.description: The user email address. Required when type is user or omitted.

name.description: The user or customer group name.

role.description: The SupportBee role value: 9 for Collaborator, 10 for Agent, or 20 for Admin.

team_ids.description: SupportBee team IDs to associate with the user.

type.description: Whether to create or update a user or customer group.

anyOf.description: Whether customer group members can access group tickets from the portal.

email_domains.description: Email domains whose users should automatically join the customer group.

inputSchema.description: Input fields for creating or updating a SupportBee user or customer group.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee user or customer group ID.
The SupportBee user type when returned.
The user email address when returned.
The user or customer group display name.
The SupportBee role string when returned.
Whether SupportBee marks the user as an agent.

teams.description: The teams returned with the user.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

user.description: A normalized SupportBee user or customer group.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a SupportBee user.

actions.name: get_ticket
actions.description: Retrieve a SupportBee ticket by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a SupportBee ticket.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee ticket ID.
The ticket subject.
The number of replies on the ticket.
The number of comments on the ticket.
The ticket creation time returned by SupportBee.
The ticket last-activity time returned by SupportBee.
Whether the ticket is currently unanswered.
Whether the ticket is archived.
Whether the ticket is marked as spam.

labels.description: The label names returned with the ticket.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a SupportBee ticket.

actions.name: get_ticket_reply
actions.description: Retrieve one SupportBee ticket reply by ticket ID and reply ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a SupportBee ticket reply.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee reply ID.
The reply creation time returned by SupportBee.
The reply summary returned by SupportBee.

cc.description: The CC email addresses returned with the reply.

bcc.description: The BCC email addresses returned with the reply.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a SupportBee ticket reply.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Retrieve one SupportBee user or customer group by ID.

anyOf.description: The maximum number of tickets SupportBee should include for the user.
Request all tickets for the user.

max_tickets.description: The maximum number of tickets SupportBee should include for the user, or false to request all tickets.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a SupportBee user or customer group.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee user or customer group ID.
The SupportBee user type when returned.
The user email address when returned.
The user or customer group display name.
The SupportBee role string when returned.
Whether SupportBee marks the user as an agent.

teams.description: The teams returned with the user.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

user.description: A normalized SupportBee user or customer group.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a SupportBee user.

actions.name: list_labels
actions.description: List custom SupportBee labels for the connected desk.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SupportBee labels.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee label ID.
The SupportBee label name.
The SupportBee ticket ID associated with the label.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee labels.

actions.name: list_teams
actions.description: List SupportBee teams with optional user expansion filters.

with_users.description: Whether SupportBee should include users in each team.

user.description: The SupportBee user filter. Official docs currently support me.

inputSchema.description: Input filters for listing SupportBee teams.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee team ID.
The SupportBee team name.

items.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

users.description: The users returned with the team when requested.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee teams.

actions.name: list_ticket_comments
actions.description: List comments for a SupportBee ticket.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SupportBee ticket comments.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee comment ID.
The comment creation time returned by SupportBee.
The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee ticket comments.

actions.name: list_ticket_replies
actions.description: List replies for a SupportBee ticket.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SupportBee ticket replies.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee reply ID.
The reply creation time returned by SupportBee.
The reply summary returned by SupportBee.

cc.description: The CC email addresses returned with the reply.

bcc.description: The BCC email addresses returned with the reply.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee ticket replies.

actions.name: list_tickets
actions.description: List SupportBee tickets with optional official ticket filters.

per_page.description: The number of records to retrieve. SupportBee requires this to be less than 100.

page.description: The one-based SupportBee page number to retrieve.

archived.description: How SupportBee should include archived tickets: true, false, or any.

spam.description: Whether SupportBee should include tickets marked as spam.

trash.description: Whether SupportBee should include trashed tickets.

replies.description: Whether SupportBee should return only tickets with replies or only tickets without replies.

max_replies.description: The exact number of replies a ticket must have.

assigned_user.description: SupportBee assigned_user filter such as me, any, none, or an agent ID.

assigned_team.description: SupportBee assigned_team filter such as mine, none, or a team ID.

label.description: The SupportBee label name used to filter tickets.

since.description: A SupportBee date, date-time, or timestamp lower bound for ticket activity.

until.description: A SupportBee date, date-time, or timestamp upper bound for ticket activity.

total_only.description: Whether SupportBee should return only the total ticket count.

inputSchema.description: Input filters for listing SupportBee tickets.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee ticket ID.
The ticket subject.
The number of replies on the ticket.
The number of comments on the ticket.
The ticket creation time returned by SupportBee.
The ticket last-activity time returned by SupportBee.
Whether the ticket is currently unanswered.
Whether the ticket is archived.
Whether the ticket is marked as spam.

labels.description: The label names returned with the ticket.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

anyOf.description: The current SupportBee page number when returned.
The SupportBee page size when returned.
The total number of SupportBee pages when returned.
The total number of SupportBee tickets when returned.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee tickets.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List SupportBee users and customer groups.

with_invited.description: Whether SupportBee should include invited users.

with_roles.description: Role names SupportBee should include, sent as a comma-separated with_roles query value.

inputSchema.description: Input filters for listing SupportBee users and customer groups.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee user or customer group ID.
The SupportBee user type when returned.
The user email address when returned.
The user or customer group display name.
The SupportBee role string when returned.
Whether SupportBee marks the user as an agent.

teams.description: The teams returned with the user.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

items.description: A normalized SupportBee user or customer group.

users.description: The users and customer groups returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee users.

actions.name: remove_label_from_ticket
actions.description: Remove a SupportBee label from a ticket.

label_name.description: The SupportBee label name to remove.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for removing a SupportBee label from a ticket.

ok.description: Whether the label operation completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when removing a SupportBee label.

actions.name: search_tickets
actions.description: Search SupportBee tickets by query text with optional pagination filters.

per_page.description: The number of records to retrieve. SupportBee requires this to be less than 100.

page.description: The one-based SupportBee page number to retrieve.

spam.description: Whether SupportBee should include tickets marked as spam.

trash.description: Whether SupportBee should include trashed tickets.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching SupportBee tickets.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee ticket ID.
The ticket subject.
The number of replies on the ticket.
The number of comments on the ticket.
The ticket creation time returned by SupportBee.
The ticket last-activity time returned by SupportBee.
Whether the ticket is currently unanswered.
Whether the ticket is archived.
Whether the ticket is marked as spam.

labels.description: The label names returned with the ticket.

anyOf.description: The user, requester, agent, commenter, or replier object returned by SupportBee.
The ticket, reply, or comment content object returned by SupportBee.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

anyOf.description: The current SupportBee page number when returned.
The SupportBee page size when returned.
The total number of SupportBee pages when returned.
The total number of SupportBee tickets when returned.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing SupportBee tickets.

actions.name: update_user
actions.description: Update a SupportBee user or customer group by ID.

email.description: The user email address. Required when type is user or omitted.

name.description: The user or customer group name.

role.description: The SupportBee role value: 9 for Collaborator, 10 for Agent, or 20 for Admin.

team_ids.description: SupportBee team IDs to associate with the user.

type.description: Whether to update a user or customer group.

anyOf.description: Whether customer group members can access group tickets from the portal.

email_domains.description: Email domains whose users should automatically join the customer group.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a SupportBee user or customer group.

anyOf.description: The SupportBee user or customer group ID.
The SupportBee user type when returned.
The user email address when returned.
The user or customer group display name.
The SupportBee role string when returned.
Whether SupportBee marks the user as an agent.

teams.description: The teams returned with the user.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.

user.description: A normalized SupportBee user or customer group.

raw.description: The raw object returned by SupportBee.
